name: Nithin R
summary: Software Development Engineer specializing in Gen AI, ML systems, and billion-scale vector search platforms at Amazon. Expert in RAG pipelines, LLMs, and distributed ML infrastructure with proven cost optimization delivering millions in savings.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer
experience.team: Gen AI & ML Feature Store for Amazon Catalog
experience.description: Built billion-scale vector similarity search platforms using Faiss-HNSW for 4B-70B+ multimodal embeddings. Invented patent-pending online vector search architecture achieving 80% cost reduction. Designed Apache Iceberg framework eliminating $1.2M annual costs. Built LLM automation platform with Claude 3.5 Sonnet processing 40K+ items annually.
highlights: Designed billion-scale vector similarity search using Faiss-HNSW over 4B-70B+ embeddings
Built offline ANN pipeline with AWS Batch, S3, Step Functions achieving 85% cost savings
Invented patent-pending hybrid OpenSearch + DynamoDB architecture with 80% cost reduction
Designed Apache Iceberg framework eliminating $1.2M annual infrastructure costs
Built LLM automation platform with Claude 3.5 Sonnet processing 40K+ items annually

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: Built end-to-end NLP pipelines for insurance document processing using LSTM, GRU, and BERT. Developed large-scale computer vision pipelines for person re-identification. Improved multi-object tracking accuracy from 62.2% to 74.8% and reduced latency by 75%.
highlights: Built NLP automation for insurance using LSTM, GRU, BERT with NER and relation extraction
Developed CV pipeline for person re-identification using MobileNet, EfficientDet, DeepSORT
Improved tracking accuracy from 62.2% to 74.8%, reduced latency by 75%
Designed safety monitoring system using SSD, YOLOv3, PoseNet on NVIDIA Triton
Built distributed training pipelines on Google Cloud ML Engine

projects.name: Building RAG Agents with LLMs
projects.description: Engineered RAG chatbot using SentenceTransformers, Qdrant, and GPT-4 reducing hallucination by 40%. Optimized retrieval latency by 35% through hybrid search achieving sub-second response on 50K+ documents.

projects.name: AI/ML-Powered Clinical Decision Support System
projects.description: Developed multi-model ML pipeline for early sepsis prediction using XGBoost and LSTM achieving AUROC 0.92 with 6-10 hour early warnings. Built explainable AI system with SHAP and LLM-generated clinical summaries.

Cloud Platforms: AWS (Lambda, S3, Step Functions, DynamoDB, EKS, ECS)
